command:
cd /Users/vincentdeboer/vscode
rm -rf session-record-sync
gh repo clone vcjdeboer/session-record session-record-sync 2>&1 | tail -1
cd session-record-sync
cp ../swamp/publish/session-record/{session_record.ts,manifest.yaml,README.md,LICENSE.md} .
echo "=== git status ==="; git status --short
echo "=== versions in clone ==="; grep -m1 'version:' manifest.yaml; grep -m1 'version: "2026' session_record.ts
